name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement. Used alongside the Mutual-NDA standard terms to form an executed agreement.

name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys. A balanced, bilateral confidentiality agreement for technology companies.

name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement — an easy agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Design Partner Agreement, used when a company engages a design partner to provide feedback on an early-stage product.

name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Service Level Agreement, designed to be used alongside the Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) to define uptime and support commitments.

name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Professional Services Agreement, covering the delivery of professional or consulting services including statements of work and deliverables.

name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Data Processing Agreement, addressing GDPR and data protection obligations between a data controller and data processor.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Partnership Agreement, used to establish the terms of a commercial partnership between two companies.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Software License Agreement, covering on-premise or downloadable software licensing including usage rights and restrictions.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Pilot Agreement, a short-term contract that allows a prospective customer to trial a product or service before committing to a full commercial agreement.

name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper Business Associate Agreement, a HIPAA-required contract between a covered entity and a business associate that handles protected health information.

name: AI Addendum
description: Standard terms for the Common Paper AI Addendum, an addendum to a commercial agreement that addresses obligations and restrictions specific to AI-powered products and services.
